creator: jkh@time.cdrom.com
text:
Boot the system, use the password command.  It works fine.
	Now rebuild and install the password command.  Try and use it
	again, WTF?!

jkh@red-> passwd jkh
passwd: Permission denied
jkh@red-> ls -l /usr/bin/passwd
-r-sr-xr-x  2 root  bin  37629 Nov  2 18:51 /usr/bin/passwd
/usr/bin/passwd
passwd: Permission denied

Uh....

Fix: 

Woo, I dunno - this one might even be a bug which has crept into
	our handling of setuid or schg'd binaries, for all I know.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Do the above.
